name: Music Agent
description: Retrieving and processing music information such as tracks, albums, artists, genres, and song existence checks

skills.name: Track lookup by artist
skills.description: Retrieve tracks or songs by artist name

skills.name: Song lookup by genre
skills.description: Retrieve songs that match a specific music genre
examples: Find songs in the metal genre

skills.name: Song existence check
skills.description: Check whether a song exists by title
examples: Check if the song Imagine exists
Do you have a track called Billie Jean?
